title: Accessibility Testing Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on automated accessibility testing.

questions.question: Regarding the testing of web applications, what is the primary role of 'Accessibility Testing'?
options: To verify that a web app is usable and equitable for people with disabilities

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of using automated accessibility testing tools—such as 'axe-core'—within your unit tests?
options: It helps catch accessibility violations early in the development cycle, leading to more inclusive software
It makes your local machine faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
